case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREAURER VS. ANTHONY ZAVALA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 46.00 SERVED MAR-06-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZAVALA, ANTHONY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREAURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ZAVALA, ANTHONY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREAURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ZAVALA, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 46.00 SERVED FEB-10-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZAVALA, ANTHONY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREAURER & TAX COLLECTOR
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT ON 04/11/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GAYLE MATHEWS, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. DEFENDANT ANTHONY ZAVALA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREAURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAVALA, ANTHONY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,046.00, FOR MEDICAL SERVICES RECEIVED AT SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
